description: As part of a heavy maintenance check, a technician must perform an eddy current inspection on a specific section of the fuselage known for potential fatigue cracks.

nodes.task_description: Identify the exact area on the fuselage to be inspected, as defined in the maintenance manual.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly locates the inspection area.

nodes.task_description: Perform the eddy current inspection on the specified area.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent completes the inspection according to procedure.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the results. If a crack is found, create a non-conformance report and notify engineering for a repair disposition.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds a small crack, creates an NCR, and escalates to engineering.
